channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Nitrous oxide canisters, 27th March
item.description:
Two nitrous oxide canisters dumped under the sign for Somerville Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somer Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
There are numerous cones on the street which dont look official so need to be removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denbridge Road, Bickley, Greater London

item.title: Hazelmere, 27th March
item.description:
Bagged waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: W3w ///ruler.noted.deed, 27th March
item.description:
In the westbound carriageway of crowndale Road, just past the zebra crossing, is this piece of kerb which is a standalone mini-extension to the new segregated bike lane. It starts after the crossing without warning (no lane markings), it’s the same colour as the road surface and has no signage on it. The rubber and scratches on it show some cars have hit it already, but when a bike goes into it someone will be badly hurt. Before that happens, it would be worth the council checking it’s legal for it to be so hard to see… and even if it is legal, to paint it white at least

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crowndale Road, Somers Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
See photo

item.title: Traffic light dangerously facing wrong way by wind 2 days ago, 27th March
item.description:
Southbound light is facing the Eastbound direction. VERY DANGEROUS

item.title: Kitchen dumped on grass verge, 27th March

item.title: Degrading graffiti, 27th March
item.description:
Degrading and offensive graffiti on wall at the end of foxhole road. Please can this be painted over.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foxhole Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter and rubbish, 27th March
item.description:
Incessantly, there is litter scattered all over the forecourt and rubbish dumped behind bins - paper and light rubbish risk, or is actually being carried onto the pavement by wind

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stamford Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders Blocking Access, 27th March
item.description:
Resident called to complain about builders working at the top of Horsa Road by Tescos alleyway. They are digging up foundations and the soil is thrown everywhere and their materials are blocking public access. He would like a call back today to discuss this further.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Horsa Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree fallen on 25/5 morning, 27th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regent Square, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Flying tipping, unauthorised parking, 27th March
item.description:
Despite a penalty notice being issued more rubbish has been added to the vehicle today Also untaxed (as is the white car, there the other day, adding to the rubbish) So probably no insurance either. Hope this vehicle is moved asap
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Restons Crescent, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Still not working, 27th March
item.description:
Countdown not working. Reported several times. Also countdown not working at the next bus stop outside MIND.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
